productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Blue and Grey Check Shirt
description: <b>Style Note</b> Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from locomotive. The Fit enhances your figure while the look oozes easy charm. Team this with jeans and sports shoes on a day out with friends or with leather shoes and a cool jacket for an evening date to create an excellent impression.  <b>Product Details</b> Blue, grey, black and white check shirt, has a slim narrow collar, full buttoned placket with stitched detail, back yoke, short fold over sleeves with a button to hold the fold in place, two patch pockets on the chest in front with buttoned flap closures and branding above the right pocket and a curved hemline <b>Material and Care</b> 100% cotton Machine wash warm Do not bleach Tumble dry normal Use warm iron <b>Size and Fit</b> Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L <b>Style Note</b>Proudly display your fashion sense with this casual shirt from Locomotive.
